text: Welcome to the community, helper_alex! As our new moderator, you'll help keep things running smoothly. We're excited to have you on board!
Welcome to the community, guide_sam! As an event helper, you'll assist in organizing and running community events. We appreciate your enthusiasm!
Welcome to the community, mentor_lina! As a mentor, you'll guide and support newer members. Your experience is invaluable to us!
Welcome to the community, newbie_kim! We're glad to have you join us as a member. Feel free to introduce yourself and explore!
